/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/ChatServer/ChatServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/SessionManager/SessionManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/MongoDBManager/MongoDBManager.cpp.o -o chat_server  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 /home/quokka/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libmongocxx-static.a /home/quokka/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libbsoncxx-static.a /home/quokka/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libmongoc2.a /home/quokka/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libbson2.a /home/quokka/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libz.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm /home/quokka/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libssl.a /home/quokka/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libcrypto.a -ldl /home/quokka/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libutf8proc.a -lresolv
